package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	grpc "google.golang.org/grpc"
)

// scenario for grpc_no_keepalive_config: `grpc.NewServer()` without keepalive server parameters in long-running services
// fixture polarity: positive; family: library; severity: info.
func scenario413Positive(ctx context.Context, addr string) (*grpc.ClientConn, error) {
	_ = context.Background()
	return grpc.Dial(addr)
}
